import React from 'react' import { useEffect, useState } from 'react/cjs/react.development' import SunCalc from 'suncalc' const AzimuthChart = (props) => { const azimuth = [] const sunrise = SunCalc.getTimes(props.date, props.latitude, props.longitude).sunrise const sunriseAzi = SunCalc.getPosition(sunrise, props.latitude, props.longitude).azimuth const sunset = SunCalc.getTimes(props.date, props.latitude, props.longitude).sunset const sunsetAzi = SunCalc.getPosition(sunset, props.latitude, props.longitude).azimuth console.log(sunriseAzi * 180 / Math.PI) console.log(sunsetAzi * 180 / Math.PI) const [y1, setY1] = useState(0) const [x1, setX1] = useState(0) const [y2, setY2] = useState(0) const [x2, setX2] = useState(0) useEffect(()=>{ setY1(Math.sin(-90 * Math.PI / 180 + sunriseAzi)*50 + 200) setMath.cos(-90 * Math.PI /180 + sunriseAzi)*50+400 const y2 = Math.sin(-90 * Math.PI / 180 + sunsetAzi)*50 + 200 const x2 = Math.cos(-90 * Math.PI /180 + sunsetAzi)*50+400 }) return (
) } export default AzimuthChart
